children.text: Over 20 years we have played at Orpington Rovers FC and there have been so many great memories, but unfortunately they have decided to part ways. We want to continue to be able to offer district football to so many boys a and girls, therefore we are looking for a new venue for match days…
If you know any schools or football clubs that might be able to support for the upcoming season then please
